---
toc: false
format: 
  html: 
    include-in-header: hero-image.html
    include-after-body: _footer.html
    sidebar: false
    anchor-sections: false
    css: [theme.css, index.css]
listing:
- id: noticias
  contents: "noticias/2026/**/*.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 300px
  fields: [image, title, description]
  max-items: 6
  categories: false
  
- id: presentations
  contents: "references/presentations/posts/*.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: default
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 300px
  fields: [image, title, description]
  max-items: 6
  categories: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# To change the hero-image:

# open theme.css
# find the .hero-image section
```

```{r}
#| include: false
library(htmltools)
source("R/functions.R")
```

:::{.column-screen}
:::{.column-body}

<h1 style="text-align: center;">Acerca de</h1>

:::
:::

***


:::{.column-screen}
:::{.column-screen-inset}
:::{.home-column-image .col-right}
<a href="https://labs.ala.org.au/lens">
![](images/logos/jusmer-cuad-blanco.png){width="85%"}
</a>

:::

:::{.home-column-text .col-left}

<center> 

<span>El presente proyecto de investigación se enfoca en analizar las preferencias por justicia de mercado en Chile y su relación con criterios de merecimiento.</span><br>

<span>La principal hipótesis de este proyecto es que las preferencias por justicia de mercado se asocian con las percepciones de distintos criterios de merecimiento, las que tienen un fuerte trasfondo cultural.</span><br>

</center>



:::
:::

::: {.btn-container}
[Sobre el proyecto](software/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::


:::


:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#9B2626;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#noticiash1}
:::


<center> <h1 class="heading-home" style="color: #fff;">Noticias</h1>
<span style = "color: #fff; font-style: italic">Últimas actualizaciones</span> 
</center>

::: {#noticias}
:::

::: {.btn-container}
[Noticias anteriores](noticias/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::


:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#fff;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#presentationsh1}
:::


<center> <h1 class="heading-home" style="color: #212525;">Presentaciones</h1>
</center>

::: {#presentations}
:::

::: {.btn-container}
[Presentaciones anteriores](presentaciones/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::

:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#9b2626;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#publicacionesh1}
:::


<center> <h1 class="heading-home" style="color: #fff;">Publicaciones</h1>
</center>

::: {#publicaciones}
:::

::: {.btn-container}
[Todas las publicaciones](noticias/index.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="background-color: #212525; margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::


:::{.column-screen style="background-color:#fff;"}
:::{.column-screen-inset}

:::{#equipoh1}
:::

<center> <h1>{{< fa circle-user >}} Equipo</h1> </center>

```{r}
#| echo: false
tags$div(class = "row", # Create a row for 3 team-member cards
         
create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://jc-castillo.com/",
  img_src = "images/people/jc.png",
  name = "Juan Carlos Castillo",
  text = "Investigador Principal"
),
create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://andreas-lafferte.github.io/alaffert-website/",
  img_src = "images/people/andreas.jpg",
  name = "Andreas Laffert",
  text = "Asistente de investigación"
),
create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom%C3%A1s-urz%C3%BAa-moreno-b65755375/",
  img_src = "images/people/tomas.jpg",
  name = "Tomás Urzúa",
  text = "Tesista"
)
)
tags$div(class = "row", # Create a row for 3 team-member cards
         
create_team_card(
  person_page = "https://renejcanales.github.io/renecanales-website/",
  img_src = "images/people/rene.jpg",
  name = "René Canales",
  text = "Asistente de investigación"
)
)
```

:::
:::
